subject: grammar
title: Prepositions: of, in, for, on, to, with
instruction: Fill in the gaps with of | in | for | on | to | with.

questions.text: My family live in an old, wooden house ___ shutters.
Our main meal ___ the day usually includes rice and vegetables.
She got the best exam results ___ the whole school.
At a wedding reception in Britain, all the guests usually get a piece ___ the cake.
In my country there are special universities ___ talented sportsmen and women.
You need a large amount ___ money if you want to travel around the world.
My recent business trip ___ Florida was a great success.
The house ___ the corner is for sale.
The weather ___ Greece is wonderful compared with here.
You should buy a grammar book ___ answers, so that you can practise by yourself.
